title: 8 Things a Man of God Kills While He Still Can
caption:
You don't have a weakness. You have a thing you've decided to keep.

The private tab. The comparison that runs your mood. The excuse that's been starting on Monday for three years. The unconfessed sin growing roots in the dark.

These aren't struggles. They're rented rooms in your life, and you can choose to stop paying.

Scripture doesn't say manage your sin. It says put it to death. Kill the access. Kill the excuse. Kill the thing you keep calling a season.

Do it while you still can.

Save this and send it to the brother who keeps "working on it."

#faith #christianmen #discipline #killsin #godlymen #manofgod #realtalk #selfcontrol #christianity #scripture
